facebook.caption: POV: you find the chè spot locals actually queue for. Chè Nhà Jun-Chè Ngon Phú Quốc sits on Lý Thường Kiệt and the 4.8-star rating across 279 reviews tells you everything you need to know. Cold, layered, loaded with toppings. This is the dessert break your Phu Quoc itinerary is missing. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bowls of chè hitting the counter one after another. Locals lining up at Chè Nhà Jun-Chè Ngon Phú Quốc on Lý Thường Kiệt. 4.8 stars. 279 reviews. You'll see why in the first bite.
